summary: The diff implements a comprehensive full-stack BGMI tournament website with Motoko backend and React frontend. Most requirements are covered, but several specific acceptance criteria have gaps or are partially implemented. Key issues include: the backend is truncated so full verification is limited; the login page stores placeholder values instead of real player data after OTP verification; the admin dashboard edit/delete for tournaments appears incomplete; the backend uses Internet Identity (Principal-based) rather than mobile-number-based OTP auth as specified; and several backend-specific ACs cannot be fully verified due to truncation.

missing_requirements.requirement: One account per mobile number is enforced at the backend level; OTP is tied to mobile number input by the player
missing_requirements.reason: The backend in main.mo uses Principal (Internet Identity) as the player key, not mobile number. The frontend login/register uses generateOtp() and verifyOtp() without passing a mobile number to the backend, meaning OTP is not keyed per mobile number as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-49: Duplicate mobile number shows a clear error message on the registration page
missing_requirements.reason: The backend enforces player uniqueness via Principal, not mobile number string. A duplicate mobile check per mobile string is not implemented as required.

missing_requirements.requirement: REQ-50: On successful OTP login, player display name and BGMI Player ID are properly loaded into session
missing_requirements.reason: LoginPage.tsx sets login({ mobile, displayName: mobile, bgmiPlayerId: '' }) — using mobile as displayName placeholder and empty bgmiPlayerId, meaning the dashboard will not correctly show the player's actual display name and BGMI Player ID from the backend.

missing_requirements.requirement: Dashboard shows player's actual display name and BGMI Player ID from backend
missing_requirements.reason: Because login stores placeholder values (displayName = mobile, bgmiPlayerId = ''), the dashboard will display incorrect player info. There is no backend call after login to fetch the real player profile.

missing_requirements.requirement: Tournament Management section supports edit and delete of existing tournaments
missing_requirements.reason: The TournamentFormModal visible in the diff is titled 'Add Tournament' only. Edit pre-population and delete functionality for existing tournaments is not confirmed in the visible truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Registrations section lists all registrations with player info and payment screenshots and approve/reject actions
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminDashboardPage diff is truncated and the Registrations tab content cannot be confirmed from the available diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Player List section shows all registered players
missing_requirements.reason: The AdminDashboardPage diff is truncated and the Player List section content cannot be confirmed from the visible code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Room ID and Password are only returned to players with Approved registration status
missing_requirements.reason: The backend main.mo is truncated after the registerForTournament function starts. The conditional room details return based on approval status cannot be verified from the available diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Tournament filledSlots increments on approved registration; status auto-sets to Full when filledSlots equals totalSlots
missing_requirements.reason: The backend is truncated mid-function. The slot increment and auto-Full logic cannot be confirmed from the available diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: All data models are persisted in stable storage
missing_requirements.reason: The backend declares regular mutable variables without the 'stable' keyword visible in the truncated main.mo. Stable storage declaration cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: All active tournaments render as cards with all specified fields including Full status tournaments
missing_requirements.reason: The useAllTournaments hook calls actor.findUnusedSlots() which only returns tournaments with available slots, so full tournaments would not appear in the listing at all, making the Full status card display impossible.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication infrastructure is included throughout the codebase
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states Internet Identity or Web3 wallet authentication is a non-goal, yet the codebase includes useInternetIdentity.ts, InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient integration, and the backend uses Principal as the player identifier.

hallucinated_features.description: HomePage with hero section and features marketing content at route /
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a home page at route / with hero sections, feature cards, or marketing content. This was added beyond the specified requirements.
